description_long: This house features a rectangular footprint with high, solid exterior walls and a flat roof, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with subtle greenish trim along the upper edges, possibly representing vegetation or decorative elements. The interior layout is partially visible from above, revealing multiple rooms with brown and white flooring, and some interior partitions. Windows are set high on the walls and are relatively small, contributing to a sense of privacy and security. The roofline is flat and unadorned, with no visible overhangs or complex roof structures. The overall design suggests a contemporary urban residence with a focus on simplicity and clean lines.
description: A modern, rectangular house with high white walls, flat roof, and minimal exterior detailing. The interior features multiple rooms with brown and white flooring, and small, high-set windows.
description_view_0: The front view shows a long, solid white wall with small, high-set windows and a hint of green trim at the top.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the interior layout, including brown and white flooring and several partitioned rooms.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain white wall with two small windows and minimal exterior features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again exposes the interior, showing more of the room arrangement and the flat roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no porch or steps, and no decorative overhangs.
